chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D- 3520 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ PRIORITY. 1) For hearing of CMA No. 16416/23. 2) For hearing of main case. 08.08.2023. Mr. Zain A. Jatoi, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Agha Shahid Majeed Khan, Advocate for respondents. ________________ It is informed that now Show Cause Notices have been issued to the Petitioner; whereas, the goods of the Petitioner are lying in bonded warehouse. In view of such position, the Petitioner is directed to respond to the Show Cause Notices before the concerned Adjudication Collectorate, which shall pass an appropriate order in accordance with law after affording opportunity of hearing to the Petitioner and such exercise of passing of the order be carried out within 30 days from today. The Petitioner is at liberty to raise all legal submissions as may be available to him, including the objection that when a consignment is released under Section 81 of the Customs Act, 1969, a Show Cause Notice cannot be issued under Section 32 of the said Act. Let a copy of this order be issued to the respondents as well as concerned Collector of Customs (Adjudication) Karachi. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms with pending application(s). J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz
